faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about KPNP products and services

whatIsKPNP.q: What is KPNP and what products do you offer?
whatIsKPNP.a: KPNP is a World Taekwondo approved manufacturer of electronic scoring systems (PSS), protective gear, competition uniforms, and performance apparel. We are the official US distributor for all KPNP products.

shippingTime.a: Standard shipping within the United States typically takes 3-7 business days. Expedited shipping options are available at checkout. Orders placed before 2 PM EST are usually processed the same day.

internationalShipping.a: Currently, we only ship within the United States. For international orders, please contact us directly at info@kpnpamerica.com and we'll work to accommodate your needs.

returnPolicy.a: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase for unused items in original packaging. Electronic scoring equipment must be returned in factory-sealed condition. Please contact our support team to initiate a return.

rentalHow.a: We offer full PSS equipment rental for tournaments and events. Simply fill out the rental inquiry form with your event details, and our team will provide a custom quote including setup, delivery, and technical support.

paymentMethods.q: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) through our secure Stripe payment processing. We also accept payments via bank transfer for large orders.

productWarranty.q: Do your products come with a warranty?
productWarranty.a: PSS system products are covered by a 1-year manufacturer warranty. All non-PSS system products are covered for manufacturing defects within 7 days from the date the product is received. For electronic socks, the warranty is voided once the tag is removed.

contactSupport.q: How can I contact customer support?
contactSupport.a: You can reach us by phone at (585) 570-5767, by email at info@kpnpamerica.com, or use the chat feature on our website. Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM EST.
